data.title: implementation-plan SKILL.md line 709 has stale /dso:design-wireframe reference
data.description: plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md line 709 references '/dso:design-wireframe <story-id>' as a command to produce design manifests inline. design-wireframe is now a redirect stub pointing to dso:ui-designer. This reference would redirect rather than execute if a user follows it. Update to reference dso:ui-designer dispatched by /dso:preplanning Step 6.
